name: stream-ingestion
description: Stop rewriting the same stream boilerplate. stream-ingestion handles the hard parts — backpressure, resource cleanup, cancellation, and ordered parallel processing via worker threads — so you can focus on your actual logic. Pluggable sink architecture, AbortSignal support, constant memory, zero dependencies. Built for ETL, file processing, and data-heavy workloads.

scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm run build:test && node --test dist-tests/tests/*.js
scripts.bench: npm run build && npm run build:test && node dist-tests/benchmarks/run-all.js

author: aelhor
